requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Series Evidence for Nicaragua PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——尼加拉瓜光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——尼加拉瓜光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: No publicly confirmed Nicaragua-specific mandatory EMC technical regulation for PV inverters has been identified in the public sources reviewed for this draft. For grid-tied PV projects, EMC evidence should therefore be prepared around internationally recognized IEC documentation and any NTON/DGCN, MEM/INE, ENATREL, distributor, lender, or project-owner requirement that applies to the specific procurement. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-series standards are commonly used for harmonic emissions, immunity, and power-quality evidence. Because Nicaragua operates at 60 Hz, EMC and harmonic data obtained only under China's 50 Hz test conditions should be reviewed for retesting or engineering equivalence before submission.
summary.zh: 在本草案所查阅的公开来源中，尚未确认尼加拉瓜存在专门针对光伏逆变器的强制性EMC技术法规。因此，并网光伏项目的EMC证据应围绕国际认可的IEC文件，以及适用于具体采购的NTON/DGCN、MEM/INE、ENATREL、配电公司、贷款方或项目业主要求准备。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列通常用于谐波排放、抗扰度和电能质量证据。由于尼加拉瓜为60 Hz，若EMC和谐波数据仅在中国50 Hz测试条件下取得，提交前应评估是否需要重新测试或提供工程等效性说明。
summary.zht: 在本草案所查閱的公開來源中，尚未確認尼加拉瓜存在專門針對光伏逆變器的強制性EMC技術法規。因此，併網光伏項目的EMC證據應圍繞國際認可的IEC文件，以及適用於具體採購的NTON/DGCN、MEM/INE、ENATREL、配電公司、貸款方或項目業主要求準備。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列通常用於諧波排放、抗擾度和電能品質證據。由於尼加拉瓜為60 Hz，若EMC和諧波資料僅在中國50 Hz測試條件下取得，提交前應評估是否需要重新測試或提供工程等效性說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards, including harmonic-current emission and immunity methods where applicable
Nicaraguan NTON/DGCN conformity context where a national technical standard or project specification requires it
MEM / INE / ENATREL / distributor project requirements where applicable

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly embedded in GB/T 37408 testing and domestic certification files issued by CNAS-accredited laboratories. Those reports may use IEC 61000-derived methods, but they are issued under a Chinese domestic standard scope and commonly under 50 Hz supply conditions. They should not be presented as automatic IEC 62920 or Nicaragua project EMC acceptance unless the report explicitly maps to the IEC clause set, test configuration, power rating, firmware configuration, and 60 Hz operating condition required by the project.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常包含在GB/T 37408测试及由CNAS认可实验室出具的国内认证文件中。这些报告可能使用源自IEC 61000的方法，但其出具范围属于中国国内标准，且通常基于50 Hz供电条件。除非报告明确映射至项目要求的IEC条款、测试配置、功率等级、固件配置和60 Hz运行条件，否则不应将其作为IEC 62920或尼加拉瓜项目EMC验收的自动依据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常包含在GB/T 37408測試及由CNAS認可實驗室出具的國內認證文件中。這些報告可能使用源自IEC 61000的方法，但其出具範圍屬於中國國內標準，且通常基於50 Hz供電條件。除非報告明確映射至項目要求的IEC條款、測試配置、功率等級、韌體配置和60 Hz運行條件，否則不應將其作為IEC 62920或尼加拉瓜項目EMC驗收的自動依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
China CNAS-accredited domestic laboratory reports under Chinese GB/T scope

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is not enough by itself for a Nicaragua PV project if the procurement, lender, MEM/INE reviewer, ENATREL, distributor, or NTON/DGCN conformity path expects IEC evidence. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence for the specific inverter model, applicable IEC 61000 harmonic and immunity reports, a test-condition statement covering 60 Hz operation, and a clause-by-clause cross-reference explaining any Chinese GB/T data reused in the file.
gap.zh: 差距：如果采购方、贷款方、MEM/INE审查方、ENATREL、配电公司或NTON/DGCN合格评定路径要求IEC证据，则GB/T 37408 EMC证据本身不足以支持尼加拉瓜光伏项目。出口商应准备特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据、适用的IEC 61000谐波和抗扰度报告、覆盖60 Hz运行的测试条件说明，以及解释所复用中国GB/T数据的逐条款对照表。
gap.zht: 差距：如果採購方、貸款方、MEM/INE審查方、ENATREL、配電公司或NTON/DGCN合格評定路徑要求IEC證據，則GB/T 37408 EMC證據本身不足以支持尼加拉瓜光伏項目。出口商應準備特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據、適用的IEC 61000諧波和抗擾度報告、覆蓋60 Hz運行的測試條件說明，以及解釋所復用中國GB/T資料的逐條款對照表。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — mandatory where required by NTON/DGCN conformity, MEM/INE or ENATREL/distributor review, lender specifications, or project-owner procurement; 60 Hz test-condition relevance should be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme dependent under China GB/T inverter certification; not a Nicaragua EMC acceptance substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC reports as supporting material only unless they explicitly map to IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 requirements and cover 60 Hz operation. For Nicaragua PV projects, prepare IEC EMC and harmonic evidence acceptable to the project reviewer, MEM/INE context, ENATREL or distributor process, and any NTON/DGCN conformity route that applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告明确映射至IEC 62920 / IEC 61000要求并覆盖60 Hz运行，否则仅应作为辅助材料。尼加拉瓜光伏项目应准备项目审查方、MEM/INE背景、ENATREL或配电公司流程以及适用NTON/DGCN合格评定路径可接受的IEC EMC和谐波证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告明確映射至IEC 62920 / IEC 61000要求並覆蓋60 Hz運行，否則僅應作為輔助材料。尼加拉瓜光伏項目應準備項目審查方、MEM/INE背景、ENATREL或配電公司流程以及適用NTON/DGCN合格評定路徑可接受的IEC EMC和諧波證據。
